title: orchis farreri
intro: Orchis farreri, also known as the Farrer's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orchis farreri include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and relieving bronchial spasms, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Orchis farreri include dried roots and tubers, which can be decocted or made into teas, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
